title: subworkflow - awsregionfailover wait for run command execution
description: Helper subworkflow to wait for AWS SSM Run Command completion during region failover orchestrations.
guide:
## Helper subworkflow to wait for AWS SSM Run Command completion during region failover orchestrations.

🧠 Polls AWS SSM Run Command status and retries while still running.

### ⚙️ Inputs
- 🌍 `awsregion`
- 🧾 `CommandId`
- 🔌 `dynatraceawsconnection`

### ✅ Behavior
- Calls `ssm-list-commands`
- Retries while status is in-progress
- Returns final command status payload

get-status.name: get-status
get-status.description: Poll command status list by CommandId.

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Retry until run command reaches terminal state.
